title: Dark Purpose
writer: Massimo D'Avak, David P. Harmon, Doris Hume Kilburn
actors: Shirley Jones, Rossano Brazzi, George Sanders
plot: Shirley Jones plays an innocent young American abroad (Italy, specifically), assistant to the cynically sarcastic art historian Sanders. She becomes romantically involved with Sanders' current employer, the always charming Brazzi,...
